---
title: "RentProjectWIP"
author: "Yun W & Paige S"
date: today
format: pdf
output-file: "Group4ProjectWIP"
output-ext: "pdf"
editor: source
---
```{r 01}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
RentWIP <- read_csv("C:/Users/kongy/Downloads/apartment+for+rent+classified/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K.csv")
View(RentWIP)
```


```{r 02}
RentWIP <- read_delim(
  "C:/Users/kongy/Downloads/apartment+for+rent+classified/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K.csv",
  delim = ";"
)
```


```{r 03}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  rename_with(tolower)
head(RentWIP)
```


```{r 04}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    price = as.numeric(price),
    square_feet = as.numeric(square_feet),
    bathrooms = as.numeric(bathrooms),
    bedrooms = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(bedrooms))
  )
```


```{r 05}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    title = str_squish(str_to_sentence(title)),
    body = str_squish(body),
    amenities = str_squish(str_to_lower(amenities))
  ) 
  RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    pets_allowed = as.factor(pets_allowed),
    state = as.factor(state),
    cityname = as.factor(cityname),
    fee = as.factor(fee))
    RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_to_lower))
```


```{r 06}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    pets_allowed = case_when(
      pets_allowed == "Cats,Dogs" ~ "cat,dog",
      pets_allowed == "None" ~ "None",
      TRUE ~ "None"
    )
  )
```


```{r 07}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    amenities = case_when(
      amenities == "null" ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ amenities
    )
  )
```
